roles.name: x_onb_lifecycle.admin
roles.description: Full administrative access to the Employee Onboarding & Offboarding application.

roles.name: x_onb_lifecycle.hr
roles.description: HR staff who create/view/close lifecycle requests and view the HR dashboard.

roles.name: x_onb_lifecycle.it_agent
roles.description: IT Support agents who work IT-department lifecycle tasks.

roles.name: x_onb_lifecycle.facilities_agent
roles.description: Facilities agents who work Facilities-department lifecycle tasks.

roles.name: x_onb_lifecycle.security_agent
roles.description: Security agents who work Security-department lifecycle tasks.
